name: Banana Split Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 ounces Duncan Hines Moist Deluxe White Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 13-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. Dissolve baking soda in buttermilk in a mixing bowl.
4. Add cake mix, mashed bananas, oil, and egg whites to the bowl. Mix well.
5. Spoon half of the banana mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Sprinkle 1/4 cup chopped walnuts evenly over the batter.
7. Drizzle fudge topping over the walnuts.
8. Top with remaining banana mixture, spreading evenly.
9. Sprinkle remaining walnuts on top.
10. Bake for 45 minutes or until lightly browned.
